title: Rhodiola ishidae
intro:

Rhodiola rosea is an adaptogenic plant native to high-altitude regions in Europe, Asia, and North America, known for its medicinal properties. Rhodiola rosea has been traditionally used to improve mental performance, reduce stress and anxiety, and enhance mood, due to its ability to adapt the body to stress and promote overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Rhodiola rosea include rosavin, rosin, and salidroside, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. The most common herbal preparations made with Rhodiola rosea include capsules, tablets, and tinctures, as well as teas and infusions.
